description:
Click Here to Book Now : https://ditto.sh/9jbw1b

Best Term Insurance Plans for 2026 | HDFC VS TATA AIG | Sanjay Kathuria

Choosing the right term insurance is one of the most important financial decisions you’ll ever make, yet most people choose the wrong plan due to confusion, ads, and price-based selling. In this video, Sanjay Kathuria breaks down how to select the right term insurance using logic, data, and real-life responsibility mapping—without blindly trusting brand names or cheapest premiums.

What you’ll learn in this video:
✅ How to judge an insurance company’s long-term track record
✅ Why plan design matters more than premium price
✅ How claim settlement really works in real scenarios
✅ Price vs value: why the cheapest plan can be risky
✅ How to match life cover with family responsibilities
✅ Common term insurance mistakes most people make

This video focuses on decision-making frameworks, not product selling—so you can confidently choose the right protection for your family in 2026 and beyond.

#partnership 

SEO Tags:
term insurance, best term insurance 2026, term insurance explained, term insurance comparison, life insurance india, term plan selection, insurance planning india, claim settlement ratio, insurance company track record, price vs value insurance, term insurance mistakes, family financial protection, life cover planning, financial planning india, insurance basics
